subject: Re: from me
body:
thnks

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> Thanks for an interesting week! Next time your
> friends run into bad PR, tell
> them the Swedish saying: "better notorious, than not
> known at all." Of
> course, Lapo's case might be the exception...
> 
> Working on homework for M&A class now. Turned out to
> be a fluff-class, but
> still interesting. I'm in class all day Sunday, but
> I enjoy being at Stern!
> 
> I hope you can enjoy the jetski this weekend!
> 
> Always, Cecilia
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
thnks

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Thanks for an interesting week! Next time your
friends run into bad PR, tell
them the Swedish saying: "better notorious, than not
known at all." Of
course, Lapo's case might be the exception...

Working on homework for M&A class now. Turned out to
be a fluff-class, but
still interesting. I'm in class all day Sunday, but
I enjoy being at Stern!

I hope you can enjoy the jetski this weekend!

Always, Cecilia
